http:request-config.name: database-sapi-request-config
http:request-config.doc:name: Database System API — HTTP Request Configuration

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { 'correlationId': vars.correlationId default correlationId, 'appName': app.name, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': 'Start of flow ' ++ flow.name, 'timestamp': now() }]
#['Loaded ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.headerParsed.rows) as String) ++ ' service call records']
logger.doc:name: Log — records loaded

async.doc:name: Async - Isolate Materials Batch Job Memory

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write((vars.allRecords map (rec) -> (rec.Service_Call_ID default '')) filter (id) -> id != '', 'application/json')

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.queryPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { ((payload default []) map (row) -> { (row.service_call_id): true }) }

logger.message: #['Idempotency pre-check complete — ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.embeddedServiceCallLookup) as String) ++ ' service call(s) already embedded']
logger.doc:name: Idempotency pre-check complete

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Payload for Batch Queue (JSON Strings)

logger.message: #['Beginning batch processing of ' ++ sizeOf(payload) ++ ' sanitized JSON string records...']
logger.doc:name: Log - Batch Size

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.listObjects filter ((file) -> (lower(file.key) contains "apptnotes") or (lower(file.key) contains "ordermaterials") or (lower(file.key) contains "headerdata") ) map $.key
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read(payload, 'application/json')

logger.message: #[var actualError = if (error != null and error.errorType != null and error.errorType.identifier == 'RETRY_EXHAUSTED' and sizeOf(error.suppressedErrors default []) > 0) error.suppressedErrors[-1] else error --- 'Bedrock embedding failed after retries for service call: ' ++ (vars.parsedRecord.serviceCallId default 'Unknown') ++ '. Reason: ' ++ (actualError.description default 'Unknown')]
logger.doc:name: Log: Error

logger.message: #['Persisting block of ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.serviceCallBlock.serviceCallRows) as String) ++ ' service call(s)']
logger.doc:name: Log — persisting service call block

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.feedbackPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "INSERT INTO service_calls_v3 (service_call_id, service_description, problem_desc, custnmbr, adrscode, division, combined_notes) VALUES (:service_call_id, :service_description, :problem_desc, :custnmbr, :adrscode, :division, :combined_notes) ON CONFLICT (service_call_id) DO UPDATE SET service_description = EXCLUDED.service_description, problem_desc = EXCLUDED.problem_desc, custnmbr = EXCLUDED.custnmbr, adrscode = EXCLUDED.adrscode, division = EXCLUDED.division, combined_notes = EXCLUDED.combined_notes, updated_at = NOW()", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.serviceCallRows }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.putMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.updateFeedback'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "UPDATE service_calls_v3 SET search_embedding = CAST(:vec_literal AS vector), updated_at = NOW() WHERE service_call_id = :service_call_id", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.embeddingUpdateRows }

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (bulk delete old appointments)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.deleteMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.deleteFeedback'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "DELETE FROM hvac_appointments_v3 WHERE service_call_id = :serviceCallId", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.serviceCallIds map ((id) -> { "serviceCallId": id }) }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.feedbackPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "INSERT INTO hvac_appointments_v3 (service_call_id, appt_number, office_notes, summary_notes, onsite_start_time, onsite_stop_time, status, followup_reason) VALUES (:service_call_id, :appt_number, :office_notes, :summary_notes, CAST(:onsite_start_time AS TIMESTAMPTZ), CAST(:onsite_stop_time AS TIMESTAMPTZ), :status, :followup_reason)", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.appointmentRows }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.deleteMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.deleteFeedback'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "DELETE FROM hvac_service_items_v3 WHERE service_call_id = :serviceCallId AND was_recommended = FALSE", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.serviceCallIds map ((id) -> { "serviceCallId": id }) }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.feedbackPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "INSERT INTO hvac_service_items_v3 (service_call_id, material_id, trxqty, billing_amount, was_recommended) VALUES (:service_call_id, CAST(:material_id AS uuid), :trxqty, :billing_amount, FALSE)", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.serviceItemRows }

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (bulk update usage count)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.putMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.updateFeedback'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "UPDATE hvac_materials_v3 SET usage_count = COALESCE(usage_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE material_id = CAST(:material_id AS uuid)", parameters: vars.serviceCallBlock.materialIdsToIncrement }

logger.message: #['All pipeline blocks complete. Batch processed: ' ++ (payload.processedRecords default 0) as String ++ ' successfully, ' ++ (payload.failedRecords default 0) as String ++ ' failed.']
logger.doc:name: Log: Completion

choice.doc:name: Check Failed Records Threshold for Archival

logger.message: Batch completed within failure threshold. Proceeding to archive S3 files.
logger.doc:name: Log: Archival Started

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/java var timestamp = now() as String {format: "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"} var archivedPath = payload replace "wo_data/pending/" with "wo_data/archive/" var parts = archivedPath splitBy "." --- if (sizeOf(parts) > 1) (parts[0 to -2] joinBy ".") ++ "_" ++ timestamp ++ "." ++ parts[-1] else archivedPath ++ "_" ++ timestamp
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- Mule::p('s3.bucketName')

logger.message: S3 files successfully archived.
logger.doc:name: Log - Archival Completed

logger.message: #['Batch failed records (' ++ payload.failedRecords ++ ') exceeded threshold. Skipping S3 archival.']
logger.doc:name: Log - Archival Skipped

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { 'correlationId': vars.correlationId default correlationId, 'appName': app.name, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': 'End of flow ' ++ flow.name, 'timestamp': now() }]
Seeding hvac_materials_v3.
logger.doc:name: Seeding started

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (create unique index DDL)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.ddlExecute'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

logger.message: #['Found ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.uniqueMaterialCatalogEntries default []) as String) ++ ' unique materials in JSON']
logger.doc:name: Log:Unique material count

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- write((vars.uniqueMaterialCatalogEntries default []) map (m) -> m.materialKey, 'application/json')

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.queryPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.feedbackPath'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "INSERT INTO hvac_materials_v3 (material_id, itemnmbr, itemdesc, item_category) VALUES (CAST(:material_id AS uuid), :itemnmbr, :itemdesc, :item_category) ON CONFLICT (LOWER(itemdesc)) DO UPDATE SET itemnmbr = EXCLUDED.itemnmbr, item_category = EXCLUDED.item_category, updated_at = NOW()", parameters: vars.materialSeedingPlan.newMaterialCatalogEntries }

logger.message: #['UPSERT catalog (bulk): ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.materialSeedingPlan.newMaterialCatalogEntries) as String) ++ ' new material(s)']
logger.doc:name: Log — new materials upserted (bulk)

logger.message: No new materials to upsert into hvac_materials_v3
logger.doc:name: No new materials

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare and Sanitize Payload for Batch Queue (JSON Strings)

logger.message: #['Beginning background batch processing of ' ++ sizeOf(payload) ++ ' sanitized JSON string materials...']
logger.doc:name: Log:Batch Size

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- read(payload, 'application/json')
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { embeddings: vars.parsedRecord.materialEmbedInputTruncated }

logger.message: #[var actualError = if (error != null and error.errorType != null and error.errorType.identifier == 'RETRY_EXHAUSTED' and sizeOf(error.suppressedErrors default []) > 0) error.suppressedErrors[-1] else error --- 'Bedrock embedding failed after retries for material: ' ++ (vars.parsedRecord.itemdesc default 'Unknown') ++ '. Reason: ' ++ (actualError.description default 'Unknown')]
logger.doc:name: Log: Error Message

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.parsedRecord ++ { item_embedding_literal: if (vars.materialEmbeddingResponse != null) '[' ++ ((vars.materialEmbeddingResponse.embedding map (v) -> v as String {format: '0.00000000'}) joinBy ',') ++ ']' else null }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- (payload map (read($, 'application/json'))) filter ((row) -> row.item_embedding_literal != null)

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (Bulk Update Material Embeddings)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.putMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.updateFeedback'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.responseTimeout') }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sql: "UPDATE hvac_materials_v3 SET item_embedding = CAST(:item_embedding_literal AS vector), updated_at = NOW() WHERE material_id = CAST(:material_id AS uuid)", parameters: vars.materialEmbeddingUpdateRows }

logger.message: #['Embedded ' ++ (sizeOf(vars.materialEmbeddingUpdateRows) as String) ++ ' HVAC material(s) (bulk update)']
#['Materials embeddings batch complete. Processed: ' ++ (payload.processedRecords default 0) as String ++ ' successfully, ' ++ (payload.failedRecords default 0) as String ++ ' failed.']
logger.doc:name: Log: Complete

logger.message: No materials require embedding in the background
logger.doc:name: Log: No materials need embedding

logger.message: Creating IVFFlat vector indexes...
logger.doc:name: IVFFlat index creation started

try.doc:name: Try — IVFFlat index creation (non-fatal on timeout)

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (Create DDL Index for hvac_materials)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.ddlExecute'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.ddlResponseTimeout') }

ee:transform.doc:name: vars: httpOperation, requestPayload (Create DDL Index service_calls)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: p('awsAurora.postMethod'), host: p('awsAurora.host'), basePath: p('awsAurora.basePath'), path: p('awsAurora.ddlExecute'), responseTimeout: p('awsAurora.ddlResponseTimeout') }

logger.message: Vector indexes created.
logger.doc:name: IVFFlat index creation complete

on-error-continue.doc:name: On Error Continue — DDL timeout is non-fatal

logger.message: #['IVFFlat index creation failed or timed out — indexes will be retried on next run: ' ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log — index creation failed non-fatally
